nasb.text: These are the sons of Gilead: of Iezer, the family of the Iezerites; of Helek, the family of the Helekites;

esv.text: These are the sons of Gilead: of Iezer, the clan of the Iezerites; of Helek, the clan of the Helekites;

cnv.text: 以下就是基列的子孫：屬伊以謝的，有伊以謝家族；屬希勒的，有希勒家族；

ccb.text: 基列的子孙有伊以谢族、希勒族、
